content: {"key_findings": ["Search converged after 3 active rounds with ~300 fetched URLs spanning Scientific, Public_Health, Regional, Methodological, Industry, Emerging_Trends, Regulatory perspectives", "The evidence base covers short-term efficacy (pooled effect sizes), long-term safety (AHA 2024 NHANES signal + Ramadan free-living counterweight), mechanisms (circadian, IL-22/ILC3, adipose remodeling), commercial apps, and regulatory posture", "No additional queries needed — Round 4 returned zero new URLs indicating saturation", "Evidence sufficient for synthesis; continuing would produce redundancy"], "perspective_gaps": [], "web_queries": [], "academic_queries": [], "exa_queries": [], "convergence_assessment": "saturated", "should_continue": false, "reasoning": "Round 4 already returned zero new URLs, confirming the field's accessible evidence base has been exhaustively sampled. Proceed to analysis, verification, and synthesis.", "knowledge_gaps": ["Long-duration (>12 month) prospective cohort IF cardiovascular mortality data beyond AHA 2024 — absent from literature", "LMIC-specific metabolic-syndrome IF RCTs — sparse field", "Head-to-head IF vs GLP-1 RA RCTs — not yet completed"]}
